description: Advanced widget settings: keyboard-shortcut recorder + global Carbon hotkeys, conditional progress bar, native always-on-top.

Shortcut_Model_Store.notes: KeyCombo (Codable), ShortcutAction enum (10 actions matching the window), ShortcutStore (UserDefaults JSON, @Published).

Carbon_HotKey_Engine.notes: RegisterEventHotKey per bound combo; InstallEventHandler dispatch -> onAction(ShortcutAction); reload on store change.

Shortcut_Recorder_UI.notes: 'Record Shortcut' pill; local NSEvent monitor captures modifier+key; shows ⌘⇧P; clear button.

Keyboard_Shortcuts_Window.notes: NSWindow listing all actions in 3 groups with recorder pills, matching the screenshot.

Progress_Bar_Toggle.notes: settings.showProgress gates the bar in ALL sizes incl. Medium/Regular, clean reflow.

Wiring.notes: App creates ShortcutStore+HotKeyManager, maps actions; SettingsMenu opens the window + wires Keep-in-front.
